_cadence: Currently DAILY (cron 0 2 * * *). Data (AIR 18k-channel study) favors 3-4 longs/week + 2-3 Shorts/week over daily; recommendation pending user decision — see docs/WEEKLY_OPS.md. To switch: edit ops/com.corelifecycle.daily.plist StartCalendarInterval to Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun and reload.
_note: LIVE: produces+reviews+publishes daily at 2AM (doodle). Off: enabled:false or launchctl unload.
_useModal_note: false=render locally (~28min on Mac). Set true for Modal sharded cloud render (~7-9min) once the Modal billing-cycle spend limit resets / credits added (capped 2026-06-22).
